---
title: "Running"
description: |
  Running for fun in Denver, CO.
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    code_folding: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, R.options = list(width = 60))
```


![Fall colors on 7th St in the Congress Park neighborhood.](fallcolors7th.jpg)

I started running in early 2017. When I started, I needed to stop every 0.25-0.5 mile to walk. I followed the 10% rule and have worked up to an average 35-40 miles per week for the last few years. Running is an outlet and it's important to me that I keep it fun. I don't wear a GPS (prefer perceived effort) and instead map distances post-run with [Footpath](https://footpathapp.com/), which I highly recommend.

![Footpath map of a recent good long run around Washington Park.](washpark.jpg)

## Miles in 2019-2020

I started tracking weekly distances mid-2018, so I now have two full years of run data (2019, 2020). Here are some weekly data:

```{r message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(cowplot)
library(colorspace)
```

```{r}
theme_set(theme_cowplot(font_size =18))
```

```{r}
running <- read_csv('annualmpw.csv')
running
```
```{r, echo=TRUE}
running_long <- running %>% 
  pivot_longer(!week, names_to = "year", values_to = "miles")
```



```{r}
ggplot(running_long, aes(x=week, y=miles, color=year))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#fc7b6d", "#05354b"))+
  geom_smooth(fullrange=TRUE, span=0.2, size=1.25)+
  geom_point(size=3, alpha=0.6)+
  theme(legend.position = "top")+
  labs(x="week [1:52]", y="miles/week") 
```


```{r}
running %>%
  summarize(`total miles in 2019` = sum(miles_2019), 
            `total miles in 2020` = sum(miles_2020))
```
## Racing

I don't really race, and especially not in the past year. Still, I have a hard time keeping track of the outcomes when I do, so I'll keep PR's here. 

* 5k PR: 20:15 (6:53 min/mi), 5/4/2019 National MS Society 5K at City Park, Denver, CO. 1st F / 4th overall.
* 10k PR: 42:39 (6:52 min/mi), 12/7/2019 Santa Stampede in Littleton, CO.
* 10 mile: 1:13:49 (7:23 min/mi), 1/25/2019 Frosty's Frozen 5 and 10 at Hudson Gardens in Littleton, CO. 4th F.
* Half marathon: 1:36:05 (7:20 min/mi), 2/22/2020 Snowman Stampede at Hudson Gardens in Littleton, CO. 4th F.
* Full marathon? TBD!

![National MS Society 5k, May 2019](walkmsfirst.jpg)
